description.ko: 아쿠아-5는 대양의 가장 깊은 곳에 위치한 최첨단 수중 연구 시설입니다. 고도의 내압 소재와 생체 발광 기술을 활용하여 미지의 해양 생태계와 열수 에너지원을 연구합니다.
description.en: AQUA-5 is a state-of-the-art underwater research facility stationed in the deepest parts of the ocean. It utilizes advanced pressure-resistant materials and bioluminescent technology to study uncharted marine ecosystems and hydrothermal energy sources.

prompt: A cinematic, wide-angle shot of the AQUA-5 deep-sea station, featuring a futuristic modular design with glowing cyan bioluminescent accents, submerged in the midnight zone of the Pacific Ocean, surrounded by schools of transparent jellyfish and volcanic thermal vents, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, unreal engine 5 render, volumetric underwater lighting.
